We will start scraping the webpage by reading the content of the file and then parsing it with Beuatiful Soup.

In [2]:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
with open('avanza.html','r') as f:
    html = f.read()
soup = BeautifulSoup(html, 'html.parser')
In [4]:
soup

<body class="rlDisabled viewCTA disable-outline" data-aza-error-monitor="" data-aza-pjax="" data-aza-save="isPageResponsive=false;hidePageFooter=false;hidePageHeader=false;" data-aza-togglebar="" data-aza-tooltip="" data-ng-class="{'disable-outline':disableOutline,'openNav' : showResponsiveNav, 'rl': isPageResponsive, 'rlDisabled': !isPageResponsive}" data-ng-controller="pageController" data-settings="{ 'editMode': 'false', 'feResourceVersion':'ver-3011363', 'jsLoaded': '-766373869', 'cssLoaded': '-616414536', 'pushSubscriptionId': '-', 'pushEnabled': 'false', 'pushBaseUrl': 'https://push.avanza.se', 'securityToken': '-' }">
<script>
	// Handle theme setting
	try {
		// This implementation needs to match theme handler service and local storage service in PWA
		let theme = 'light';
		const themeEnc = localStorage.getItem('browser-theme-setting');
		if (themeEnc) {
			theme = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(atob(themeEnc))).value;
		}

		if (theme === 'system') {
			theme = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light';
		}

		if (theme === 'dark' && !document.location.pathname.startsWith('/kampanj')) {
			document.body.dataset.theme = 'dark';
		}
	} catch (e) {}
</script>

<div class="header_index header-index">
<div class="component headerIndex" data-aza-controller="market:headerIndexController" data-ng-controller="headerIndexController">
<ul class="u-floatList u-clearFix headerIndexList">
<!-- ngRepeat: index in headerIndex --><li class="" data-aza-save="model[index.link.orderbookId].priceAtStartOfYear=index.priceAtStartOfYear" data-ng-repeat="index in headerIndex" style="">
<span class="flag small u-fLeft SE"></span>
<a class="secondaryLink u-fLeft" href="/index/om-indexet.html/19002/omx-stockholm-30" title="OMX Stockholm 30">OMXS30</a>
<span class="arrowBox xsmall positive" data-ng-class="{'neutral': commonService.isNeutral(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday), 'negative': commonService.isNegative(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday), 'positive': commonService.isPositive(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday)}"></span>
<span class="positive" data-ng-class="{'neutral': commonService.isNeutral(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday), 'negative': commonService.isNegative(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday), 'positive': commonService.isPositive(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday)}">
<span data-aza-push="model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday">0,94</span>%
            </span>
<span data-aza-push="model[index.link.orderbookId].todayPriceUpdatedTime">15:37</span>
            (<span class="negative" data-ng-class="{'neutral': commonService.isNeutral(model[index.link.orderbookId].devCurrentYear), 'negative': commonService.isNegative(model[index.link.orderbookId].devCurrentYear), 'positive': commonService.isPositive(model[index.link.orderbookId].devCurrentYear)}"><span data-aza-push="model[index.link.orderbookId].devCurrentYear">-2,00</span>%</span> i år)
        </li><!-- end ngRepeat: index in headerIndex --><li class="" data-aza-save="model[index.link.orderbookId].priceAtStartOfYear=index.priceAtStartOfYear" data-ng-repeat="index in headerIndex">
<span class="flag small u-fLeft US"></span>
<a class="secondaryLink u-fLeft" href="/index/om-indexet.html/155458/dj-usa" title="DJ USA">DJ USA</a>
<span class="arrowBox xsmall positive" data-ng-class="{'neutral': commonService.isNeutral(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday), 'negative': commonService.isNegative(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday), 'positive': commonService.isPositive(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday)}"></span>
<span class="positive" data-ng-class="{'neutral': commonService.isNeutral(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday), 'negative': commonService.isNegative(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday), 'positive': commonService.isPositive(model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday)}">
<span data-aza-push="model[index.link.orderbookId].devToday">0,45</span>%
            </span>
<span data-aza-push="model[index.link.orderbookId].todayPriceUpdatedTime">15:37</span>
            (<span class="positive" data-ng-class="{'neutral': commonService.isNeutral(model[index.link.orderbookId].devCurrentYear), 'negative': commonService.isNegative(model[index.link.orderbookId].devCurrentYear), 'positive': commonService.isPositive(model[index.link.orderbookId].devCurrentYear)}"><span data-aza-push="model[index.link.orderbookId].devCurrentYear">0,47</span>%</span> i år)
        </li><!-- end ngRepeat: index in headerIndex -->
<li>

</li>
</ul>

<script id="global-search.html" type="text/ng-template">
	<div class="global-search">
	
		
		
			<div class="component" data-aza-controller="search:globalSearchController as vm">
				<h1 class="rightOverlayHeader">Sök</h1>
				<input class="searchInput"
					   type="search"
					   aria-label="Sök Värdepapper"
					   placeholder="Sök Värdepapper"
					   data-autofocus
					   data-ng-model="vm.searchQuery"
					   data-ng-model-options="{ debounce: 250 }"
					   data-ng-keydown="vm.onKeydown($event)"
					   data-ng-change="vm.search(vm.searchQuery)" />

				<div class="searchResultContainer"
					 data-ng-show="vm.searchQuery"
					 data-aza-list-navigator="li.item:visible"
					 data-aza-list-navigator-class="active"
					 data-aza-html-compile="vm.searchResultSource">
				</div>
			</div>
		
	
	</div>
</script>
</div>

</div>

<li class="">
<button class="expandNavItem">

<svg class="visibleXs" height="11" width="19" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

<main class="mainContainer flexbox container" id="main" role="main">
<div class="section lg-12 md-12 sm-12 xs-12">
<div class="parsys flexbox"><div class="heading lgOffsetRight-0 smOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetRight-0 section lgOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetRight-0 smOffsetRight-0 lg-12 sm-12 lgOffsetTop-0 smOffsetTop-0 md-12 mdOffsetBottom-3 xs-12 smOffsetBottom-3 mdOffsetLeft-0 lgOffsetBottom-3 xsOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetBottom-3">
<style>
	@media (max-width: 768px) {
	.rl .headingImg .img-17a3b9ed-c444-4dd8-851e-830b7f1a173f-auto {
		min-width: auto;
		max-width: auto;
		vertical-align: middle;
	}
	}

	@media (min-width: 769px) {
		.rl .headingImg {
		
		}

		.rl .headingImg .img-17a3b9ed-c444-4dd8-851e-830b7f1a173f-auto {
		min-width: auto;
		max-width: auto;

	
	}
	}

	.rlDisabled .headingImg .img-17a3b9ed-c444-4dd8-851e-830b7f1a173f-auto {
		min-width: auto;
		max-width: auto;

	
	}
</style>
<h1 class="small headingBlack u-tLeft u-sm-tLeft" style=" ">
	


	

	

	
		
		
			Aktielistan
		
	
	

</h1>
</div>
<div class="heading lgOffsetRight-0 smOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetRight-0 section lgOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetRight-0 smOffsetRight-0 lg-12 sm-12 lgOffsetTop-0 smOffsetTop-0 md-12 mdOffsetBottom-2 xs-12 mdOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetBottom-2 xsOffsetTop-0 lgOffsetBottom-2 smOffsetBottom-2">
<style>
	@media (max-width: 768px) {
	.rl .headingImg .img-d3d41b6c-1ba8-4a55-883e-cb798142d8ee-auto {
		min-width: auto;
		max-width: auto;
		vertical-align: middle;
	}
	}

	@media (min-width: 769px) {
		.rl .headingImg {
		
		}

		.rl .headingImg .img-d3d41b6c-1ba8-4a55-883e-cb798142d8ee-auto {
		min-width: auto;
		max-width: auto;

	
	}
	}

	.rlDisabled .headingImg .img-d3d41b6c-1ba8-4a55-883e-cb798142d8ee-auto {
		min-width: auto;
		max-width: auto;

	
	}
</style>
<h2 class="headingBlack u-tLeft u-sm-tLeft" style="font-size:14px; ">
	


	

	

	
		
		
			Se aktiekurser för aktier på Stockholmsbörsen, First North, Spotlight Stock Market, Nordic MTF och NGM. Dessutom kan du se utländska aktiekurser.
		
	
	

</h2>
</div>
<div class="text lgOffsetRight-0 mdOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetRight-0 section lgOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetRight-0 lgOffsetTop-0 mdOffsetBottom-3 smOffsetBottom-3 mdOffsetLeft-0 lgOffsetBottom-3 xsOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetBottom-3">
<div class="">
					Här kan du filtrera bland tusentals olika svenska och utländska aktier i jakten på just dina guldkorn. Klicka på kugghjulet för att lägga till nyckeltal, historisk avkastning, antal ägare, teknisk analys, analytikernas rekommendationer och mycket mer.
			</div>
</div>
<div class="page-title lgOffsetRight-0 smOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetRight-0 section sm-2 lgOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetRight-0 md-2 smOffsetRight-0 lg-2 lgOffsetTop-0 smOffsetTop-0 mdOffsetBottom-3 xs-12 smOffsetBottom-3 mdOffsetLeft-0 lgOffsetBottom-3 xsOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetBottom-3">
<h1 class="u-ingressText u-fLeft"></h1>
</div>
<div class="advanced-filter lgOffsetRight-0 smOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetRight-0 section smOffsetBottom-12 lgOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetRight-0 smOffsetRight-0 lg-12 sm-12 lgOffsetTop-0 smOffsetTop-0 md-12 lgOffsetBottom-12 mdOffsetBottom-12 xs-12 mdOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetBottom-3">
<div class="component u-clearFix" data-aza-controller="marketing:advancedFilterController as vm" data-ng-controller="advancedFilterController as vm">
<div class="templateManagerWrapper u-clearFix">
</div>
<script id="widget-library-template.html" type="text/ng-template">
		










<div class="widgetLibrary component" data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetLibraryController as vm">
	<h1 class="rightOverlayHeader">Lägg till filter</h1>
	
		<h3 class="widgetCategoryLabel category1"
		    data-ng-class="{'is-active': vm.isCategoryOpen('Allmänt')}"
		    data-ng-click="vm.toggleCategory('Allmänt')">
			<span>Allmänt</span>
			<a name="toggle-category">
				<span class="iconArrow"
				      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isCategoryOpen('Allmänt')}">
					<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
					<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
				</span>
			</a>
		</h3>
		<div class="widgetCategoryContent slideToggle ng-hide"
		     data-ng-show="vm.isCategoryOpen('Allmänt')">
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category1"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('loanFactor')">
					<span>Belåningsvärde</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('loanFactor', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('loanFactor')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('loanFactor')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('loanFactor')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category1 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('loanFactor')">
					<p>Aktiens belåningsvärde hos Avanza.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('loanFactor')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('loanFactor')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category1"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('shortSellable')">
					<span>Blankningsbar</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('shortSellable', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('shortSellable')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('shortSellable')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('shortSellable')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category1 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('shortSellable')">
					<p>Anger om aktien är blankningsbar hos Avanza</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('shortSellable')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('shortSellable')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category1"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('sectors')">
					<span>Bransch</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('sectors', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('sectors')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('sectors')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('sectors')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category1 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('sectors')">
					<p>Anger vilken bransch som bolaget tillhör.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									

									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
							<dl class="widgetCountryInfoUnavailable">
								<dt>Data ej tillgänglig</dt>
								<dd>
									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								</dd>
							</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('sectors')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('sectors')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category1"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('marketCapitalInSek')">
					<span>Börsvärde MSEK</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('marketCapitalInSek', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('marketCapitalInSek')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('marketCapitalInSek')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('marketCapitalInSek')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category1 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('marketCapitalInSek')">
					<p>Bolagets börsvärde i SEK. Anges i miljoner kronor.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									

									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
							<dl class="widgetCountryInfoUnavailable">
								<dt>Data ej tillgänglig</dt>
								<dd>
									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								</dd>
							</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('marketCapitalInSek')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('marketCapitalInSek')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category1"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('changeInValue')">
					<span>Historisk utv %</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('changeInValue', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('changeInValue')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('changeInValue')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('changeInValue')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category1 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('changeInValue')">
					<p>Används för att filtrera fram bolag baserat på dess historiska utveckling under vissa givna tidsperioder.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('changeInValue')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('changeInValue')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category1"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('stockLists')">
					<span>Land och lista</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('stockLists', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('stockLists')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('stockLists')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('stockLists')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category1 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('stockLists')">
					<p>Används för att filtrera fram bolag baserat på antingen specifika länder eller listor som bolagen är noterade på.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('stockLists')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('stockLists')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category1"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('textSearch')">
					<span>Sök</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('textSearch', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('textSearch')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('textSearch')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('textSearch')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category1 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('textSearch')">
					<p>Använd för att filtrera fram aktier som matchar på en viss bokstavskombination.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('textSearch')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('textSearch')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
		</div>
	
		<h3 class="widgetCategoryLabel category2"
		    data-ng-class="{'is-active': vm.isCategoryOpen('Nyckeltal')}"
		    data-ng-click="vm.toggleCategory('Nyckeltal')">
			<span>Nyckeltal</span>
			<a name="toggle-category">
				<span class="iconArrow"
				      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isCategoryOpen('Nyckeltal')}">
					<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
					<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
				</span>
			</a>
		</h3>
		<div class="widgetCategoryContent slideToggle ng-hide"
		     data-ng-show="vm.isCategoryOpen('Nyckeltal')">
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category2"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('directYield')">
					<span>Direktavkastning %</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('directYield', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('directYield')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('directYield')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('directYield')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category2 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('directYield')">
					<p>Anger utdelningens storlek i förhållande till aktiens pris. En aktie vars värde är 100:- med 5:- i utdelning har en direktavkastning på 5%.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									

									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
							<dl class="widgetCountryInfoUnavailable">
								<dt>Data ej tillgänglig</dt>
								<dd>
									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								</dd>
							</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('directYield')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('directYield')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category2"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('priceEarningsRatio')">
					<span>P/E-tal</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('priceEarningsRatio', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('priceEarningsRatio')"

					<a name="toggle-more">

						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('priceEarningsRatio')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category2 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('priceEarningsRatio')">

				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category2"

				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category2 slideToggle ng-hide"

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">

		<h3 class="widgetCategoryLabel category3"
		    data-ng-class="{'is-active': vm.isCategoryOpen('Teknisk analys')}"
		    data-ng-click="vm.toggleCategory('Teknisk analys')">
			<span>Teknisk analys</span>
			<a name="toggle-category">

		     data-ng-show="vm.isCategoryOpen('Teknisk analys')">
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category3"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('bollingerUpperLower')">
					<span>BB avstånd band %</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('bollingerUpperLower', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('bollingerUpperLower')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('bollingerUpperLower')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('bollingerUpperLower')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category3 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('bollingerUpperLower')">
					<p>Anger avståndet mellan det övre- och undre Bollinger bandet baserat på senaste handelsdagens stängning. 
<br><br>
Värdet anges i procent.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>

							</dd>

					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('bollingerUpperLower')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('bollingerUpperLower')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category3"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('bollinger')">
					<span>BB avstånd kurs</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('bollinger', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('bollinger')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('bollinger')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('bollinger')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category3 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('bollinger')">
					<p>Anger avståndet mellan antingen det övre- eller undre Bollinger bandet och aktiens kurs baserat på senaste handelsdagens stängning. 
<br><br>
Värdet anges i procent.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>

							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('bollinger')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('bollinger')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category3"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('betaRatio')">
					<span>Beta-tal</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('betaRatio', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('betaRatio')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('betaRatio')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('betaRatio')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category3 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('betaRatio')">
					<p>Beta ger ett mått på samrörligheten mellan en aktie och ett jämförelseindex. Nyckeltalet beräknas på 48 månadsvisa observationer och baseras på aktiens köpkurs i relation till de 4 nordiska indexen (SSE/CSE/HEX/OSE).</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('betaRatio')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('betaRatio')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category3"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('rsi')">
					<span>RSI 14</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('rsi', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('rsi')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('rsi')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('rsi')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category3 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('rsi')">
					<p>Senaste handelsdagens värde för RSI 14 dagar.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>

							</dd>
						</dl>
