					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('rsi')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('rsi')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category3"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('rsiTrend')">
					<span>RSI Trend</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('rsiTrend', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('rsiTrend')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('rsiTrend')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('rsiTrend')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category3 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('rsiTrend')">
					<p>Jämför senaste handelsdagens stängningsvärde för RSI 14 dagar jämfört med för 3 eller 5 dagar sedan. 
<br><br>
Avståndet anges i procent.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('rsiTrend')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('rsiTrend')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category3"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('sma')">
					<span>SMA 20/50/200</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('sma', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('sma')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('sma')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('sma')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category3 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('sma')">
					<p>Används för att ta reda på avståndet mellan senaste handelsdagens stängningskurs och värdet för SMA 20, 50 eller 200. 
<br><br>
Värdet anges i procent.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('sma')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('sma')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category3"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('sma50200')">
					<span>SMA 50/200</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('sma50200', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('sma50200')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('sma50200')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('sma50200')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category3 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('sma50200')">
					<p>Används för att ta reda på skillnaden mellan SMA 50 och SMA 200 (dagar). 
<br><br>
Värdet anges i procent.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('sma50200')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('sma50200')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category3"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('volatility')">
					<span>Volatilitet</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('volatility', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('volatility')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('volatility')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('volatility')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category3 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('volatility')">
					<p>Volatilitet anger hur stora rörelserna i aktiekursen är uttryckt i procent. Nyckeltalet beräknas på senast betald kurs i aktien under de senaste 30 handelsdagarna och anger hur mycket som aktien varierar i procent.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('volatility')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('volatility')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
		</div>
	
		<h3 class="widgetCategoryLabel category4"
		    data-ng-class="{'is-active': vm.isCategoryOpen('Övrigt')}"
		    data-ng-click="vm.toggleCategory('Övrigt')">
			<span>Övrigt</span>
			<a name="toggle-category">
				<span class="iconArrow"
				      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isCategoryOpen('Övrigt')}">
					<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
					<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
				</span>
			</a>
		</h3>
		<div class="widgetCategoryContent slideToggle ng-hide"
		     data-ng-show="vm.isCategoryOpen('Övrigt')">
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category4"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('numberOfOwners')">
					<span>Antal ägare</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('numberOfOwners', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('numberOfOwners')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('numberOfOwners')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('numberOfOwners')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category4 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('numberOfOwners')">
					<p>Antalet konton som äger aktien hos Avanza.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('numberOfOwners')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('numberOfOwners')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category4"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('timeUntilReport')">
					<span>Dagar till rapport</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('timeUntilReport', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('timeUntilReport')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('timeUntilReport')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('timeUntilReport')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category4 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('timeUntilReport')">
					<p>Används för att filtrera fram bolag som har rapport inom ett visst tidsspann.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									

									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
							<dl class="widgetCountryInfoUnavailable">
								<dt>Data ej tillgänglig</dt>
								<dd>
									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								</dd>
							</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('timeUntilReport')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('timeUntilReport')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category4"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('timeUntilDividend')">
					<span>Dagar till utdelning</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('timeUntilDividend', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('timeUntilDividend')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('timeUntilDividend')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('timeUntilDividend')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category4 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('timeUntilDividend')">
					<p>Används för att filtrera fram bolag som har utdelning inom ett visst tidsspann.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									
										
									

									
								
									
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
									
										
											
										
									

									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
							<dl class="widgetCountryInfoUnavailable">
								<dt>Data ej tillgänglig</dt>
								<dd>
									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								</dd>
							</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('timeUntilDividend')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('timeUntilDividend')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category4"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('changeInNumberOfOwners')">
					<span>Förändr. ägare %</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('changeInNumberOfOwners', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('changeInNumberOfOwners')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('changeInNumberOfOwners')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('changeInNumberOfOwners')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category4 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('changeInNumberOfOwners')">
					<p>Används för att filtrera fram ägarförändring i en aktie (hos Avanza) i procent under givna tidsperioder.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('changeInNumberOfOwners')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('changeInNumberOfOwners')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category4"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners')">
					<span>Förändr. ägare abs</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category4 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners')">
					<p>Används för att filtrera fram ägarförändring i en aktie (hos Avanza) i absoluta tal under givna tidsperioder.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
				<h4 class="widgetItemLabel category4"
				    data-ng-click="vm.toggleInfo('inSuperloan')">
					<span>Godkänd för Ränterabatt</span>
					<a name="toggle-widget" class="fade"
					   data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('inSuperloan', $event)"
					   data-ng-hide="vm.isInfoOpen('inSuperloan')"
					   data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': vm.isVisible('inSuperloan')}">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span>
					</a>

					<a name="toggle-more">
						<span class="iconArrow"
						      data-ng-class="{'is-pointingUp': vm.isInfoOpen('inSuperloan')}">
							<span class="iconArrowLeft"></span>
							<span class="iconArrowRight"></span>
						</span>
					</a>
				</h4>
				<div class="widgetItemContent category4 slideToggle ng-hide"
				     data-ng-show="vm.isInfoOpen('inSuperloan')">
					<p>Används för att filtrera fram vilka aktier som ingår i ränterabatt.</p>

					<div class="widgetCountryInfo">
						<dl class="widgetCountryInfoAvailable">
							<dt>Data tillgänglig</dt>
							<dd>

								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag SE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FI medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag CA medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag US medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NO medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DK medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag DE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag BE medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag PT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag IT medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag FR medium"></span>
									
								
									
									

									
										<span class="flag NL medium"></span>
									
								
							</dd>
						</dl>
						
					</div>

					<button class="focusBtn largeBtn"
					        data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidget('inSuperloan')"
					        data-ng-disabled="vm.isVisible('inSuperloan')">
						<span class="iconAdd"></span> Lägg till filter
					</button>
				</div>
			
		</div>
	

</div>

	</script>
<div class="category">
<div class="categoryWidgets">
<div data-aza-widget-slot="loanFactor"></div>
<script id="loanFactor.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category1 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="loanFactor"
     data-title="Belåningsvärde"
     data-category="Allmänt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Belåningsvärde</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
			
			
















<div class="component rangeFilter "
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=true"
     data-config="%7B%22min%22%3A0.0%2C%22max%22%3A100.0%2C%22step%22%3A10.0%2C%22filterField%22%3A%22loanFactor%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22-%22%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Afalse%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22LOAN_FACTOR%22%7D"
     data-initial-data="null"
     data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
	<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
		<div class="histogram"
		     data-ng-if="vm.hasFocus">
			<div class="histogramStack"
			     data-ng-repeat="value in vm.histogram track by $index"
			     data-ng-style="{ 'height': (value * 100) + '%'}"></div>
		</div>
		
			
			
				


























	


<div class="ui-slider ui-slider-horizontal ui-widget ui-widget-content ui-corner-all"
     data-aza-slider
     data-aza-slider-config=""
     data-aza-slider-disabled=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip="true"
     data-aza-slider-always-show-tooltip="false"
     data-aza-slider-min="0.0"
     data-aza-slider-max="100.0"
     data-aza-slider-step="10.0"
     data-aza-slider-value=""
     data-aza-slider-color=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-prefix=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-suffix=""
     data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower"
     data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper"
     data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()"
     data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()">
	<div class="ui-slider-range ui-widget-header ui-corner-all" style="left: 0; width: 100%;"></div>
	
		<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" tabindex="0" style="left: 100%;"></span>
	
	
		<div class="ui-slider-tooltip hide">
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
		</div>
	
</div>

			
		
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterLower">
		<input type="text" name="lower"
		       data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
		<input type="text" name="upper"
		       data-ng-model="vm.upperValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>

</div>

		
		
		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="shortSellable"></div>
<script id="shortSellable.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category1 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="shortSellable"
     data-title="Blankningsbar"
     data-category="Allmänt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Blankningsbar</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
			
			















<div class="component buttonBarFilter u-clearFix"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:buttonBarFilterController as vm"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.data.value=YES"
     data-name="shortSellable"
     data-column="SHORT_SELLABLE"
     data-title=""
     data-values="%7B%22YES%22%3A%22Ja%22%2C%22NO%22%3A%22Nej%22%7D">

	<div class="buttonBarRow">
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice roundedLeft ">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="shortSellable-0"
				       name="shortSellable"
				       value="YES"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="shortSellable-0">Ja</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice  roundedRight">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="shortSellable-1"
				       name="shortSellable"
				       value="NO"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="shortSellable-1">Nej</label>
			</div>
		
	</div>
	<div class="buttonBarRow">
		
	</div>
</div>

		
		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="sectors"></div>
<script id="sectors.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category1 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="sectors"
     data-title="Bransch"
     data-category="Allmänt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Bransch</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
		
		
		
			
			














<div class="component multiSelectFilter"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:multiSelectFilterController as vm"
     data-config="%7B%22filterField%22%3A%22sectorIds%22%2C%22dataField%22%3A%22sectors%22%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22SECTOR%22%7D"
     data-multi-select-data="%5B%7B%22id%22%3A%22137%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Alternativa%20energik%C3%A4llor%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2223%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Bank%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2217%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Bioteknik%20%26%20L%C3%A4kemedel%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%227%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Blandade%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2269%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Borrutrustning%20%26%20Tj%C3%A4nster%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2281%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Bygg%20%26%20Konstruktion%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2295%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Distribution%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2252%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Elektronisk%20Utrustning%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2240%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Fastigheter%20%26%20Utveckling%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%224%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Fastighetsinvesteringar%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%222%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Finansiella%20Tj%C3%A4nster%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2226%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Fordonsindustri%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2262%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22F%C3%B6rnyelsebara%20energik%C3%A4llor%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2245%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Hem%20%26%20Bostad%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2219%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22H%C3%A5rdvara%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2237%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22IT-Service%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2213%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Icke-f%C3%B6rnyelsebar%20energiproduktion%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%226%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Industriella%20Varor%20%26%20Tj%C3%A4nster%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2249%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Investeringar%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%22109%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Kemikalier%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2286%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Konglomerat%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2242%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Konsumenttj%C3%A4nster%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2235%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Livsmedelsproducenter%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2211%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Mat%20%26%20Dryck%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2232%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Media%20%26%20Underh%C3%A5llning%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2284%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Medicinsk%20Utrustning%20%26%20Service%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2289%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Metall%20%26%20Gruvdrift%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2256%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Mjukvara%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2278%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Papper%20%26%20Skogsindustri%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2231%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Personliga%20varor%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2228%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Telekommunikation%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2258%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Transport%20%26%20Logistik%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2220%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22V%C3%A5rd-%20och%20Omsorg%22%7D%2C%7B%22id%22%3A%2247%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22%C3%85terf%C3%B6rs%C3%A4ljare%22%7D%5D"
     data-initial-data="null">
     
    















<div class="multiSelect u-clearFix u-relative" data-aza-multi-select>
	<button class="multiSelectTrigger u-fLeft"
		data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
		data-ng-click="showList = !showList"
		tabindex="1">
		<span class="ellipsis" data-ng-hide="vm.selectedLabel">Välj branch</span>
		<span class="ellipsis ng-hide" data-ng-show="vm.selectedLabel">{{vm.selectedLabel}}</span>
		<img class="selectArrow" src="/frontend/image/select_arrow.svg">
	</button>

	<ul class="multiSelectList isMultiSelect u-cleanList u-fLeft hide" data-aza-hide="!showList">
		
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"137","name":"Alternativa energikällor"},0,!vm.selectedItem0)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem0}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Alternativa energikällor">Alternativa energikällor</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"23","name":"Bank"},1,!vm.selectedItem1)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem1}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Bank">Bank</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"17","name":"Bioteknik & Läkemedel"},2,!vm.selectedItem2)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem2}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Bioteknik & Läkemedel">Bioteknik & Läkemedel</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"7","name":"Blandade"},3,!vm.selectedItem3)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem3}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Blandade">Blandade</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"69","name":"Borrutrustning & Tjänster"},4,!vm.selectedItem4)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem4}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Borrutrustning & Tjänster">Borrutrustning & Tjänster</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"81","name":"Bygg & Konstruktion"},5,!vm.selectedItem5)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem5}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Bygg & Konstruktion">Bygg & Konstruktion</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"95","name":"Distribution"},6,!vm.selectedItem6)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem6}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Distribution">Distribution</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"52","name":"Elektronisk Utrustning"},7,!vm.selectedItem7)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem7}"
				>

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"

				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem8}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Fastigheter & Utveckling">Fastigheter & Utveckling</span>

			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"4","name":"Fastighetsinvesteringar"},9,!vm.selectedItem9)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem9}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Fastighetsinvesteringar">Fastighetsinvesteringar</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"2","name":"Finansiella Tjänster"},10,!vm.selectedItem10)'

				>

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"

				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem11}"
				>

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"45","name":"Hem & Bostad"},13,!vm.selectedItem13)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem13}"
				>

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"19","name":"Hårdvara"},14,!vm.selectedItem14)'

			<li class="multiSelectItem"

			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"6","name":"Industriella Varor & Tjänster"},17,!vm.selectedItem17)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem17}"

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"49","name":"Investeringar"},18,!vm.selectedItem18)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem18}"
				>

			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"42","name":"Konsumenttjänster"},21,!vm.selectedItem21)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem21}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Konsumenttjänster">Konsumenttjänster</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"35","name":"Livsmedelsproducenter"},22,!vm.selectedItem22)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem22}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Livsmedelsproducenter">Livsmedelsproducenter</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"11","name":"Mat & Dryck"},23,!vm.selectedItem23)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem23}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Mat & Dryck">Mat & Dryck</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"32","name":"Media & Underhållning"},24,!vm.selectedItem24)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem24}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Media & Underhållning">Media & Underhållning</span>
			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"84","name":"Medicinsk Utrustning & Service"},25,!vm.selectedItem25)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem25}"
				>

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"89","name":"Metall & Gruvdrift"},26,!vm.selectedItem26)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem26}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Metall & Gruvdrift">Metall & Gruvdrift</span>

			<li class="multiSelectItem"

				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem27}"
				>

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"

				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem28}"
				>

			<li class="multiSelectItem"

				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem29}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Personliga varor">Personliga varor</span>

			<li class="multiSelectItem"

				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem30}"
				>

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"

				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem31}"
				>

			</li>
			
		
			
			
			<li class="multiSelectItem"

				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem32}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Vård- och Omsorg">Vård- och Omsorg</span>

			<li class="multiSelectItem"
				data-ng-click='vm.toggleSelected({"id":"47","name":"Återförsäljare"},33,!vm.selectedItem33)'
				data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedItem33}"
				>
				<span class="ellipsis" title="Återförsäljare">Återförsäljare</span>
			</li>
			
		
	
	</ul>
</div>

</div>
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div class="component widget category1" data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm" data-category="Allmänt" data-is-active="true" data-is-visible="true" data-key="marketCapitalInSek" data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }" data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)" data-ng-controller="widgetController as vm" data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible" data-preview-mode="false" data-title="Börsvärde MSEK">
<div class="widgetHeader">
<h3 class="widgetTitle" data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Börsvärde MSEK</h3>
<input class="widgetToggle ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-not-empty" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive" type="checkbox"/>
<button data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()" name="delete"></button>
</div>
<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
<div class="component rangeFilter" data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm" data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=true" data-config="%7B%22filterField%22%3A%22marketCapitalInSek%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22-%22%2C%22startValue%22%3A1.0%2C%22nbrSteps%22%3A20%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Atrue%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22MARKET_CAPITAL_IN_SEK%22%2C%22step%22%3A2.0%2C%22max%22%3A520000.0%2C%22min%22%3A1.0%7D" data-initial-data="null" data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}" data-ng-controller="rangeFilterController as vm" data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
<!-- ngIf: vm.hasFocus -->
<div class="ui-slider ui-slider-horizontal ui-widget ui-widget-content ui-corner-all" data-aza-log-slider="" data-aza-slider-config="" data-aza-slider-disabled="" data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower" data-aza-slider-min="1.0" data-aza-slider-nbrsteps="20" data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()" data-aza-slider-stepsize="2.0" data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()" data-aza-slider-tooltip="true" data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper" data-aza-slider-value="">
<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" style="left: 0%;" tabindex="0"></span>
<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" style="left: 100%;" tabindex="0"></span>
<div class="ui-slider-tooltip ng-hide">
<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
</div>
<div class="ui-slider-range ui-widget-header ui-corner-all" style="left: 0%; width: 100%;"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="rangeFilterLower">
<input class="ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-not-empty" data-aza-float="" data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()" data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()" data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue" data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }" name="lower" type="text"/>
</div>
<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
<input class="ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-not-empty" data-aza-float="" data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()" data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()" data-ng-model="vm.upperValue" data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }" name="upper" type="text"/>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="changeInValue"></div>
<script id="changeInValue.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category1 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="changeInValue"
     data-title="Historisk utv %"
     data-category="Allmänt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Historisk utv %</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
		
			













<div class="component multiSlider u-clearFix"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:multiSliderController as vm">
    <div class="multiSliderTabs">
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-0"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 0}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[0].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-0" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 0)">1 v</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-1"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 1}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[1].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-1" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 1)">1 m</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-2"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 2}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[2].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-2" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 2)">3 m</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-3"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 3}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[3].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-3" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 3)">i år</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-4"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 4}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[4].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-4" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 4)">1 år</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-5"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 5}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[5].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="9c01434b-06df-4ab6-b717-82cc10dc9cdd-5" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 5)">3 år</label>
			</div>
		
    </div>

	<div class="multiSliderWrapper">
		
				
				
					
















<div class="component rangeFilter "
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=false"
     data-config="%7B%22min%22%3A-20.0%2C%22max%22%3A20.0%2C%22step%22%3A1.0%2C%22filterField%22%3A%22changeInValueSinceOneWeek%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Utveckling%20%25%201%20v%22%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Afalse%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22DEVELOPMENT_WEEK%22%7D"
     data-initial-data="null"
     data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
	<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
		<div class="histogram"
		     data-ng-if="vm.hasFocus">
			<div class="histogramStack"
			     data-ng-repeat="value in vm.histogram track by $index"
			     data-ng-style="{ 'height': (value * 100) + '%'}"></div>
		</div>
		
			
			
				


























	


<div class="ui-slider ui-slider-horizontal ui-widget ui-widget-content ui-corner-all"
     data-aza-slider
     data-aza-slider-config=""
     data-aza-slider-disabled=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip="true"
     data-aza-slider-always-show-tooltip="false"
     data-aza-slider-min="-20.0"
     data-aza-slider-max="20.0"
     data-aza-slider-step="1.0"
     data-aza-slider-value=""
     data-aza-slider-color=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-prefix=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-suffix=""
     data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower"
     data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper"
     data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()"
     data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()">
	<div class="ui-slider-range ui-widget-header ui-corner-all" style="left: 0; width: 100%;"></div>
	
		<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" tabindex="0" style="left: 100%;"></span>
	
	
		<div class="ui-slider-tooltip hide">
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
		</div>
	
</div>

			
		
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterLower">
		<input type="text" name="lower"
		       data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
		<input type="text" name="upper"
		       data-ng-model="vm.upperValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>

</div>

     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"

		<input type="text" name="lower"
		       data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
		<input type="text" name="upper"
		       data-ng-model="vm.upperValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>

</div>

				
			
	</div>

</div>




		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div class="component widget category1" data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm" data-category="Allmänt" data-is-active="true" data-is-visible="true" data-key="stockLists" data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }" data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)" data-ng-controller="widgetController as vm" data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible" data-preview-mode="false" data-title="Land och lista">
<div class="widgetHeader">
<h3 class="widgetTitle" data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Land och lista</h3>
<input class="widgetToggle ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-not-empty" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive" type="checkbox"/>
<button data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()" name="delete"></button>
</div>
<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
<div class="component landFilter" data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:landFilterController as vm" data-column="LIST" data-filter-data="%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Sverige%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Inofficiella%20(beQuoted)%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.Inofficiella%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Large%20Cap%20Stockholm%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.LargeCap.SE%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Mid%20Cap%20Stockholm%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.MidCap.SE%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22NGM%20PepMarket%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.NGM%20PepMarket%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Nordic%20SME%20Sweden%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.Nordic%20SME%20Sweden%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22SPAC%20List%20Stockholm%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.SPAC.SE%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Small%20Cap%20Stockholm%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.SmallCap.SE%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Xterna%20listan%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.Xterna%20listan%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22First%20North%20Stockholm%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.FNSE%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22NGM%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.XNGM%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Spotlight%20Stock%20Market%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22SE.XSAT%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22SE%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22USA%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22NYSE%20American%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22US.NYSE%20MKT%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22NYSE%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22US.XNYS%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22US%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Danmark%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Large%20Cap%20Copenhagen%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22DK.LargeCap.DK%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Mid%20Cap%20Copenhagen%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22DK.MidCap.DK%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Small%20Cap%20Copenhagen%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22DK.SmallCap.DK%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22First%20North%20K%C3%B6penhamn%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22DK.FNDK%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Spotlight%20Stock%20Market%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22DK.XSAT%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22DK%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Norge%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Egenkapitalbevis%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22NO.OB%20Equity%20Certificates%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22OB%20Match%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22NO.OB%20Match%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22OB%20Standard%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22NO.OB%20Standard%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22OBX%20Top%2025%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22NO.OBX%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Oslo%20Axess%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22NO.XOAS%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Spotlight%20Stock%20Market%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22NO.XSAT%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22NO%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Finland%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Large%20Cap%20Helsinki%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22FI.LargeCap.FI%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Mid%20Cap%20Helsinki%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22FI.MidCap.FI%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Prelist%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22FI.Prelist%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Small%20Cap%20Helsinki%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22FI.SmallCap.FI%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22First%20North%20Helsingfors%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22FI.FNFI%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22FI%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Kanada%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Canadian%20Securities%20Exchange%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22CA.XCNQ%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22TSX%20Venture%20Exchange%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22CA.XTSX%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Toronto%20Stock%20Exchange%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22CA.XTSE%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22CA%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Belgien%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Equiduct%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22BE.EQTB%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22BE%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Frankrike%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Equiduct%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22FR.EQTB%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22FR%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Italien%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Equiduct%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22IT.EQTB%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22IT%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Nederl%C3%A4nderna%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Equiduct%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22NL.EQTB%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22NL%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Portugal%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Equiduct%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22PT.EQTB%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22PT%22%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22Tyskland%22%2C%22lists%22%3A%5B%7B%22name%22%3A%22Equiduct%22%2C%22key%22%3A%22DE.EQTB%22%7D%5D%2C%22flagCode%22%3A%22DE%22%7D%5D" data-initial-data="%7B%22list%22%3A%5B%22SE.LargeCap.SE%22%5D%7D" data-name="stockLists" data-ng-controller="landFilterController as vm">
<div class="multiSelect u-clearFix u-relative" data-aza-multi-select="">
<button class="multiSelectTrigger u-fLeft" data-ng-click="showList = !showList" data-ng-disabled="!vm.widget.isActive" tabindex="1">
<span class="ellipsis ng-hide" data-ng-hide="vm.selectedLandLabel">Sverige</span>
<span class="ellipsis" data-ng-show="vm.selectedLandLabel">Sverige</span>
<img class="selectArrow" src="/frontend/image/select_arrow.svg"/>
</button>
<ul class="multiSelectList isMultiSelect u-cleanList u-fLeft hide" data-aza-hide="!showList">
<li class="multiSelectItem Sverige is-selected" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Sverige') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(0, true);">
					Sverige
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem USA" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('USA') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(1, true);">
					USA
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Danmark" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Danmark') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(2, true);">
					Danmark
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Norge" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Norge') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(3, true);">
					Norge
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Finland" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Finland') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(4, true);">
					Finland
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Kanada" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Kanada') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(5, true);">
					Kanada
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Belgien" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Belgien') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(6, true);">
					Belgien
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Frankrike" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Frankrike') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(7, true);">
					Frankrike
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Italien" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Italien') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(8, true);">
					Italien
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Nederländerna" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Nederländerna') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(9, true);">
					Nederländerna
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Portugal" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Portugal') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(10, true);">
					Portugal
			</li>
<li class="multiSelectItem Tyskland" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedLands.indexOf('Tyskland') !== -1}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedLand(11, true);">
					Tyskland
			</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="multiSelect u-clearFix u-relative" data-aza-multi-select="">
<button class="multiSelectTrigger u-fLeft" data-ng-click="showList = !showList" data-ng-disabled="!vm.widget.isActive" tabindex="1">
<span class="ellipsis ng-hide" data-ng-hide="vm.selectedListLabel">Alla Sverige</span>
<span class="ellipsis" data-ng-show="vm.selectedListLabel">Large Cap Stockholm</span>
<img class="selectArrow" src="/frontend/image/select_arrow.svg"/>
</button>
<ul class="multiSelectList isMultiSelect u-cleanList u-fLeft hide" data-aza-hide="!showList">
<!-- ngRepeat: landObject in vm.marketList track by $index --><!-- ngIf: landObject!==null && landObject!==undefined --><li class="landLabel" data-ng-if="landObject!==null &amp;&amp; landObject!==undefined" data-ng-repeat="landObject in vm.marketList track by $index">
<div class="dropdownDivider"></div>
<span>Sverige</span>
<ul class="u-cleanList">
<li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': landObject.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleAllMarketLists(landObject)">
					Alla Sverige
				</li>
<!-- ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					Inofficiella (beQuoted)
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem is-selected" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					Large Cap Stockholm
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					Mid Cap Stockholm
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					NGM PepMarket
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					Nordic SME Sweden
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					SPAC List Stockholm
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					Small Cap Stockholm
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					Xterna listan
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					First North Stockholm
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					NGM
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists --><li class="multiSelectItem" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': marketListItem.selected}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelectedMarketList(marketListItem, landObject)" data-ng-repeat="marketListItem in landObject.lists">
					Spotlight Stock Market
				</li><!-- end ngRepeat: marketListItem in landObject.lists -->
</ul>
</li><!-- end ngIf: landObject!==null && landObject!==undefined --><!-- end ngRepeat: landObject in vm.marketList track by $index -->
</ul>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="textSearch"></div>
<script id="textSearch.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category1 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="textSearch"
     data-title="Sök"
     data-category="Allmänt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Sök</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
		
		
		
		
			
			










<div class="component textSearchFilter u-clearFix"
 	data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:textSearchFilterController as vm"
	data-initial-data="">

	<div>
		<label for="search"></label>
		<input id="search" type="text" placeholder="Sök aktie" data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value" data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()" class="textSearchInput"/>
	</div>

</div>

		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="directYield"></div>
<script id="directYield.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category2 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="directYield"
     data-title="Direktavkastning %"
     data-category="Nyckeltal"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Direktavkastning %</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
			
			
















<div class="component rangeFilter "
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=true"
     data-config="%7B%22min%22%3A0.0%2C%22max%22%3A10.0%2C%22step%22%3A0.5%2C%22filterField%22%3A%22directYield%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22-%22%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Afalse%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22DIRECT_YIELD%22%7D"
     data-initial-data="null"
     data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
	<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
		<div class="histogram"
		     data-ng-if="vm.hasFocus">
			<div class="histogramStack"
			     data-ng-repeat="value in vm.histogram track by $index"
			     data-ng-style="{ 'height': (value * 100) + '%'}"></div>
		</div>
		
			
			
				


























	


<div class="ui-slider ui-slider-horizontal ui-widget ui-widget-content ui-corner-all"
     data-aza-slider
     data-aza-slider-config=""
     data-aza-slider-disabled=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip="true"
     data-aza-slider-always-show-tooltip="false"
     data-aza-slider-min="0.0"
     data-aza-slider-max="10.0"
     data-aza-slider-step="0.5"
     data-aza-slider-value=""
     data-aza-slider-color=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-prefix=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-suffix=""
     data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower"
     data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper"
     data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()"
     data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()">
	<div class="ui-slider-range ui-widget-header ui-corner-all" style="left: 0; width: 100%;"></div>
	
		<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" tabindex="0" style="left: 100%;"></span>
	
	
		<div class="ui-slider-tooltip hide">
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
		</div>
	
</div>

			
		
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterLower">
		<input type="text" name="lower"
		       data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
		<input type="text" name="upper"
		       data-ng-model="vm.upperValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>

</div>

		
		
		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="priceEarningsRatio"></div>
<script id="priceEarningsRatio.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category2 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="priceEarningsRatio"
     data-title="P/E-tal"
     data-category="Nyckeltal"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">P/E-tal</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
			
			
















<div class="component rangeFilter "
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=true"
     data-config="%7B%22min%22%3A0.0%2C%22max%22%3A50.0%2C%22step%22%3A1.0%2C%22filterField%22%3A%22priceEarningsRatio%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22-%22%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Afalse%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22PRICE_PER_EARNINGS%22%7D"
     data-initial-data="null"
     data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
	<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
		<div class="histogram"
		     data-ng-if="vm.hasFocus">
			<div class="histogramStack"
			     data-ng-repeat="value in vm.histogram track by $index"
			     data-ng-style="{ 'height': (value * 100) + '%'}"></div>
		</div>
		
			
			
				


























	


<div class="ui-slider ui-slider-horizontal ui-widget ui-widget-content ui-corner-all"
     data-aza-slider
     data-aza-slider-config=""
     data-aza-slider-disabled=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip="true"

<div class="component widget category2 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"

        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"

     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="priceSalesRatio"
     data-title="P/S-tal"
     data-category="Nyckeltal"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">

		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">P/S-tal</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">

				<input type="checkbox"
					id="8a6bd066-8df8-4802-bce1-2639edc425b0-0"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 0}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[0].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="8a6bd066-8df8-4802-bce1-2639edc425b0-0" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 0)">Kurs till övre</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="8a6bd066-8df8-4802-bce1-2639edc425b0-1"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 1}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[1].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="8a6bd066-8df8-4802-bce1-2639edc425b0-1" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 1)">Kurs till undre</label>
			</div>
		
    </div>

     data-aza-slider-step="1.0"
     data-aza-slider-value=""
     data-aza-slider-color=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-prefix=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-suffix=""
     data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower"
     data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper"
     data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()"
     data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()">

		<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" tabindex="0" style="left: 100%;"></span>
	
	
		<div class="ui-slider-tooltip hide">
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
		</div>
	
</div>

			
		
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterLower">
		<input type="text" name="lower"
		       data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
		<input type="text" name="upper"
		       data-ng-model="vm.upperValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>

</div>

		
		
		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
