<script id="rsiTrend.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category3 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="rsiTrend"
     data-title="RSI Trend"
     data-category="Teknisk analys"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">RSI Trend</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
		
			













<div class="component multiSlider u-clearFix"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:multiSliderController as vm">
    <div class="multiSliderTabs">
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="9701b76a-1f3d-4743-afa3-acf712a37a4e-0"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 0}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[0].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="9701b76a-1f3d-4743-afa3-acf712a37a4e-0" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 0)">3 dagar</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="9701b76a-1f3d-4743-afa3-acf712a37a4e-1"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 1}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[1].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="9701b76a-1f3d-4743-afa3-acf712a37a4e-1" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 1)">5 dagar</label>
			</div>
		
    </div>

	<div class="multiSliderWrapper">
		
				
				
					
















<div class="component rangeFilter "
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=false"
     data-config="%7B%22min%22%3A-50.0%2C%22max%22%3A50.0%2C%22step%22%3A1.0%2C%22filterField%22%3A%22rsiTrend3%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22RSI%203%20d%22%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Afalse%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22RSI_TREND_THREE_DAYS%22%7D"
     data-initial-data="null"
     data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
	<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
		<div class="histogram"
		     data-ng-if="vm.hasFocus">
			<div class="histogramStack"
			     data-ng-repeat="value in vm.histogram track by $index"
			     data-ng-style="{ 'height': (value * 100) + '%'}"></div>
		</div>

     data-aza-slider-tooltip-prefix=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-suffix=""
     data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower"
     data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper"
     data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()"
     data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()">
	<div class="ui-slider-range ui-widget-header ui-corner-all" style="left: 0; width: 100%;"></div>
	
		<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" tabindex="0" style="left: 100%;"></span>
	
	
		<div class="ui-slider-tooltip hide">
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
		</div>
	
</div>

			
		
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterLower">
		<input type="text" name="lower"
		       data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
		<input type="text" name="upper"
		       data-ng-model="vm.upperValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>

</div>

		
		
		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="volatility"></div>
<script id="volatility.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category3 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="volatility"
     data-title="Volatilitet"
     data-category="Teknisk analys"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Volatilitet</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
			
			
















<div class="component rangeFilter "
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=true"
     data-config="%7B%22min%22%3A20.0%2C%22max%22%3A100.0%2C%22step%22%3A1.0%2C%22filterField%22%3A%22volatilityRatio%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22-%22%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Afalse%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22VOLATILITY%22%7D"
     data-initial-data="null"
     data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
	<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
		<div class="histogram"
		     data-ng-if="vm.hasFocus">
			<div class="histogramStack"
			     data-ng-repeat="value in vm.histogram track by $index"
			     data-ng-style="{ 'height': (value * 100) + '%'}"></div>
		</div>
		
			
			
				


























	


<div class="ui-slider ui-slider-horizontal ui-widget ui-widget-content ui-corner-all"
     data-aza-slider
     data-aza-slider-config=""
     data-aza-slider-disabled=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip="true"
     data-aza-slider-always-show-tooltip="false"
     data-aza-slider-min="20.0"
     data-aza-slider-max="100.0"
     data-aza-slider-step="1.0"
     data-aza-slider-value=""
     data-aza-slider-color=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-prefix=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-suffix=""
     data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower"
     data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper"
     data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()"
     data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()">
	<div class="ui-slider-range ui-widget-header ui-corner-all" style="left: 0; width: 100%;"></div>
	
		<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" tabindex="0" style="left: 100%;"></span>
	
	
		<div class="ui-slider-tooltip hide">
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
		</div>
	
</div>

			
		
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterLower">
		<input type="text" name="lower"
		       data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
		<input type="text" name="upper"
		       data-ng-model="vm.upperValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>

</div>

		
		
		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div class="component widget category4" data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm" data-category="Övrigt" data-is-active="true" data-is-visible="true" data-key="numberOfOwners" data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }" data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)" data-ng-controller="widgetController as vm" data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible" data-preview-mode="false" data-title="Antal ägare">
<div class="widgetHeader">
<h3 class="widgetTitle" data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Antal ägare</h3>
<input class="widgetToggle ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-not-empty" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive" type="checkbox"/>
<button data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()" name="delete"></button>
</div>
<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
<div class="component rangeFilter" data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm" data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=true" data-config="%7B%22filterField%22%3A%22numberOfOwners%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22-%22%2C%22startValue%22%3A50.0%2C%22nbrSteps%22%3A16%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Atrue%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22NBR_OF_OWNERS%22%2C%22step%22%3A1.5%2C%22max%22%3A22000.0%2C%22min%22%3A50.0%7D" data-initial-data="null" data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}" data-ng-controller="rangeFilterController as vm" data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
<!-- ngIf: vm.hasFocus -->
<div class="ui-slider ui-slider-horizontal ui-widget ui-widget-content ui-corner-all" data-aza-log-slider="" data-aza-slider-config="" data-aza-slider-disabled="" data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower" data-aza-slider-min="50.0" data-aza-slider-nbrsteps="16" data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()" data-aza-slider-stepsize="1.5" data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()" data-aza-slider-tooltip="true" data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper" data-aza-slider-value="">
<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" style="left: 0%;" tabindex="0"></span>
<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" style="left: 100%;" tabindex="0"></span>
<div class="ui-slider-tooltip ng-hide">
<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
</div>
<div class="ui-slider-range ui-widget-header ui-corner-all" style="left: 0%; width: 100%;"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="rangeFilterLower">
<input class="ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-not-empty" data-aza-float="" data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()" data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()" data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue" data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }" name="lower" type="text"/>
</div>
<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
<input class="ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-not-empty" data-aza-float="" data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()" data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()" data-ng-model="vm.upperValue" data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }" name="upper" type="text"/>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="timeUntilReport"></div>
<script id="timeUntilReport.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category4 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="timeUntilReport"
     data-title="Dagar till rapport"
     data-category="Övrigt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Dagar till rapport</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
			
			















<div class="component buttonBarFilter u-clearFix"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:buttonBarFilterController as vm"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.data.value=LEQ_ONE_DAY"
     data-name="timeUntilReport"
     data-column="NEXT_REPORT_DATE"
     data-title=""
     data-values="%7B%22LEQ_ONE_DAY%22%3A%221%20d%22%2C%22LEQ_ONE_WEEK%22%3A%221%20v%22%2C%22LEQ_TWO_WEEKS%22%3A%222%20v%22%2C%22LEQ_ONE_MONTH%22%3A%221%20m%22%2C%22GEQ_ONE_MONTH%22%3A%22%3E1%20m%22%7D">

	<div class="buttonBarRow">
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice roundedLeft ">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilReport-0"
				       name="timeUntilReport"
				       value="LEQ_ONE_DAY"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilReport-0">1 d</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice  ">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilReport-1"
				       name="timeUntilReport"
				       value="LEQ_ONE_WEEK"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilReport-1">1 v</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice  roundedRight">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilReport-2"
				       name="timeUntilReport"
				       value="LEQ_TWO_WEEKS"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilReport-2">2 v</label>
			</div>
		
	</div>
	<div class="buttonBarRow">
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice roundedLeft ">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilReport-3"
				       name="timeUntilReport"
				       value="LEQ_ONE_MONTH"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilReport-3">1 m</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice  roundedRight">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilReport-4"
				       name="timeUntilReport"
				       value="GEQ_ONE_MONTH"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilReport-4">>1 m</label>
			</div>
		
	</div>
</div>

		
		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="timeUntilDividend"></div>
<script id="timeUntilDividend.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category4 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="timeUntilDividend"
     data-title="Dagar till utdelning"
     data-category="Övrigt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Dagar till utdelning</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
			
			















<div class="component buttonBarFilter u-clearFix"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:buttonBarFilterController as vm"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.data.value=LEQ_ONE_DAY"
     data-name="timeUntilDividend"
     data-column="NEXT_DIVIDEND_DATE"
     data-title=""
     data-values="%7B%22LEQ_ONE_DAY%22%3A%221%20d%22%2C%22LEQ_ONE_WEEK%22%3A%221%20v%22%2C%22LEQ_TWO_WEEKS%22%3A%222%20v%22%2C%22LEQ_ONE_MONTH%22%3A%221%20m%22%2C%22GEQ_ONE_MONTH%22%3A%22%3E1%20m%22%7D">

	<div class="buttonBarRow">
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice roundedLeft ">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilDividend-0"
				       name="timeUntilDividend"
				       value="LEQ_ONE_DAY"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilDividend-0">1 d</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice  ">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilDividend-1"
				       name="timeUntilDividend"
				       value="LEQ_ONE_WEEK"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilDividend-1">1 v</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice  roundedRight">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilDividend-2"
				       name="timeUntilDividend"
				       value="LEQ_TWO_WEEKS"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilDividend-2">2 v</label>
			</div>
		
	</div>
	<div class="buttonBarRow">
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice roundedLeft ">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilDividend-3"
				       name="timeUntilDividend"
				       value="LEQ_ONE_MONTH"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilDividend-3">1 m</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice  roundedRight">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="timeUntilDividend-4"
				       name="timeUntilDividend"
				       value="GEQ_ONE_MONTH"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="timeUntilDividend-4">>1 m</label>
			</div>
		
	</div>
</div>

		
		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div data-aza-widget-slot="changeInNumberOfOwners"></div>
<script id="changeInNumberOfOwners.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category4 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="changeInNumberOfOwners"
     data-title="Förändr. ägare %"
     data-category="Övrigt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Förändr. ägare %</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
		
			













<div class="component multiSlider u-clearFix"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:multiSliderController as vm">
    <div class="multiSliderTabs">
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-0"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 0}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[0].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-0" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 0)">1 d</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-1"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 1}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[1].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-1" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 1)">1 v</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-2"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 2}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[2].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-2" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 2)">1 m</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-3"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 3}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[3].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-3" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 3)">3 m</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-4"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 4}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[4].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-4" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 4)">i år</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-5"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 5}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[5].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="fa93197c-a4fd-4c4b-aa28-1dbfe499d15c-5" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 5)">1 år</label>
			</div>
		
    </div>

	<div class="multiSliderWrapper">
		
				
				
					
















<div class="component rangeFilter "
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=false"
     data-config="%7B%22min%22%3A-50.0%2C%22max%22%3A100.0%2C%22step%22%3A1.0%2C%22filterField%22%3A%22changeInNumberOfOwnersDay%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22F%C3%B6r%C3%A4nd.%20%C3%84gare%20%25%20d%22%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Afalse%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22NBR_OF_OWNERS_CHANGE_DAY%22%7D"
     data-initial-data="null"
     data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
	<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
		<div class="histogram"
		     data-ng-if="vm.hasFocus">
			<div class="histogramStack"
			     data-ng-repeat="value in vm.histogram track by $index"
			     data-ng-style="{ 'height': (value * 100) + '%'}"></div>
		</div>
		
			
			
				


























	


<div class="ui-slider ui-slider-horizontal ui-widget ui-widget-content ui-corner-all"
     data-aza-slider
     data-aza-slider-config=""
     data-aza-slider-disabled=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip="true"
     data-aza-slider-always-show-tooltip="false"
     data-aza-slider-min="-50.0"
     data-aza-slider-max="100.0"
     data-aza-slider-step="1.0"
     data-aza-slider-value=""
     data-aza-slider-color=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-prefix=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-suffix=""
     data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower"
     data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper"
     data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()"
     data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()">
	<div class="ui-slider-range ui-widget-header ui-corner-all" style="left: 0; width: 100%;"></div>
	
		<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" tabindex="0" style="left: 100%;"></span>
	
	
		<div class="ui-slider-tooltip hide">
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
		</div>
	
</div>

			
		
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterLower">
		<input type="text" name="lower"
		       data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
		<input type="text" name="upper"
		       data-ng-model="vm.upperValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>

</div>

<script id="absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category4 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="absoluteChangeInNumberOfOwners"
     data-title="Förändr. ägare abs"
     data-category="Övrigt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Förändr. ägare abs</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
		
			













<div class="component multiSlider u-clearFix"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:multiSliderController as vm">
    <div class="multiSliderTabs">
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-0"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 0}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[0].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-0" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 0)">1 d</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-1"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 1}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[1].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-1" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 1)">1 v</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-2"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 2}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[2].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-2" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 2)">1 m</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-3"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 3}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[3].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-3" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 3)">3 m</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-4"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 4}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[4].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-4" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 4)">i år</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="multiSliderTab">
				<input type="checkbox"
					id="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-5"
					data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedIndex === 5}"
					data-ng-model="vm.widget.childFilters[5].isActive"
					data-ng-change="vm.fetchHtml()"
				/>
				<label for="ade78cd2-2d4a-49bb-a35b-7cbc13c9d894-5" data-ng-click="vm.toggleSelected($event, 5)">1 år</label>
			</div>
		
    </div>

	<div class="multiSliderWrapper">

     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=false"

     data-aza-slider

     data-aza-slider-disabled=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip="true"
     data-aza-slider-always-show-tooltip="false"
     data-aza-slider-min="-5000.0"
     data-aza-slider-max="5000.0"
     data-aza-slider-step="50.0"
     data-aza-slider-value=""
     data-aza-slider-color=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-prefix=""
     data-aza-slider-tooltip-suffix=""
     data-aza-slider-lower-value="vm.filter.data.lower"
     data-aza-slider-upper-value="vm.filter.data.upper"
     data-aza-slider-start-callback="vm.activateFilter()"
     data-aza-slider-stop-callback="vm.fetchItems()">
	<div class="ui-slider-range ui-widget-header ui-corner-all" style="left: 0; width: 100%;"></div>
	
		<span class="ui-slider-handle ui-state-default ui-corner-all" tabindex="0" style="left: 100%;"></span>
	
	
		<div class="ui-slider-tooltip hide">
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-content"></div>
			<div class="ui-slider-tooltip-arrow"></div>
		</div>
	
</div>

			
		
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterLower">
		<input type="text" name="lower"
		       data-ng-model="vm.lowerValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>
	<div class="rangeFilterUpper">
		<input type="text" name="upper"
		       data-ng-model="vm.upperValue"
		       data-ng-model-options="{ updateOn: 'change blur', allowInvalid: false }"
		       data-aza-float
		       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()"
		       data-ng-focus="vm.updateHistogram()"/>
	</div>

</div>

				
					
















<div class="component rangeFilter ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:rangeFilterController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{'is-disabled': !vm.filter.isActive}"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.isActive=false"
     data-config="%7B%22min%22%3A-5000.0%2C%22max%22%3A5000.0%2C%22step%22%3A50.0%2C%22filterField%22%3A%22changeInNumberOfOwnersMonthAbs%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22F%C3%B6r%C3%A4nd.%20%C3%84gare%201%20m%22%2C%22logarithmic%22%3Afalse%2C%22responseField%22%3A%22NBR_OF_OWNERS_CHANGE_ABS_MONTH%22%7D"
     data-initial-data="null"
     data-ng-hide="!vm.filter.isVisible">
	<div class="rangeFilterSlider">
		<div class="histogram"
		     data-ng-if="vm.hasFocus">

			     data-ng-repeat="value in vm.histogram track by $index"
			     data-ng-style="{ 'height': (value * 100) + '%'}"></div>
		</div>

<div data-aza-widget-slot="inSuperloan"></div>
<script id="inSuperloan.html" type="text/ng-template">



















<div class="component widget category4 ng-hide"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:widgetController as vm"
     data-ng-class="{
        'is-disabled': !vm.widget.isActive,
        'has-focus': vm.hasFocus
     }"
     data-ng-show="vm.widget.isVisible"
     data-ng-click="vm.onClick($event)"
     data-key="inSuperloan"
     data-title="Godkänd för Ränterabatt"
     data-category="Övrigt"
     data-is-active="false"
     data-is-visible="false"
     data-preview-mode="false">
	<div class="widgetHeader">
		<h3 class="widgetTitle " data-ng-click="vm.showMoreInfo()">Godkänd för Ränterabatt</h3>
		<input class="widgetToggle" type="checkbox" data-ng-model="vm.widget.isActive">
		<button name="delete" data-ng-click="vm.removeWidget()"></button>
	</div>

	<div class="widgetWrapper u-clearFix">
		
	
		
		
			
			















<div class="component buttonBarFilter u-clearFix"
     data-aza-controller="marketing/advanced-filter:buttonBarFilterController as vm"
     data-aza-save="vm.filter.data.value=YES"
     data-name="inSuperLoan"
     data-column="IN_SUPERLOAN"
     data-title=""
     data-values="%7B%22YES%22%3A%22Ja%22%2C%22NO%22%3A%22Nej%22%7D">

	<div class="buttonBarRow">
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice roundedLeft ">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="inSuperLoan-0"
				       name="inSuperLoan"
				       value="YES"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="inSuperLoan-0">Ja</label>
			</div>
		
			<div class="buttonBarChoice  roundedRight">
				<input type="radio"
				       id="inSuperLoan-1"
				       name="inSuperLoan"
				       value="NO"
				       data-ng-disabled="!vm.filter.isActive"
				       data-ng-model="vm.filter.data.value"
				       data-ng-change="vm.fetchItems()">

				<label for="inSuperLoan-1">Nej</label>
			</div>
		
	</div>
	<div class="buttonBarRow">
		
	</div>
</div>

		
		
		
		
		
	

	</div>
</div>






	</script>
<div class="widget addWidget">
<button class="button blueBtn largeBtn withIcon" data-ng-click="vm.toggleWidgetLibrary()" name="add">Lägg till filter
				</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="u-dividerWithLabel">
<label class="">
<span class="" data-ng-hide="!vm.totalNumberOfHits">157 träffar</span>
</label>
</div>
<div class="columnLibraryWrapper u-clearFix">
<div class="component columnLibrary u-clearFix" data-aza-controller="marketing:columnLibraryController as vm" data-aza-save='vm.selectedColumns=["LATEST","DEVELOPMENT_TODAY","DEVELOPMENT_ONE_YEAR","MARKET_CAPITAL_IN_SEK","PRICE_PER_EARNINGS","DIRECT_YIELD","NBR_OF_OWNERS","LIST"];vm.defaultColumnConfigs=["Standard","Kurs","Historik"];vm.columnConfigs=[];vm.hasSuffix=false' data-ng-controller="columnLibraryController as vm">
<div class="tabs" data-aza-scroller="">
<div class="tabsScrollContainer" data-aza-scroller-container="">
<!-- ngRepeat: defaultColumnConfig in vm.defaultColumnConfigs --><button class="tab defaultLoadTab is-selected is-first" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedColumnConfig.id === defaultColumnConfig.id, 'is-first': $first}" data-ng-click="vm.setDefaultColumnConfig(defaultColumnConfig)" data-ng-repeat="defaultColumnConfig in vm.defaultColumnConfigs">Standard
				</button><!-- end ngRepeat: defaultColumnConfig in vm.defaultColumnConfigs --><button class="tab defaultLoadTab" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedColumnConfig.id === defaultColumnConfig.id, 'is-first': $first}" data-ng-click="vm.setDefaultColumnConfig(defaultColumnConfig)" data-ng-repeat="defaultColumnConfig in vm.defaultColumnConfigs">Kurs
				</button><!-- end ngRepeat: defaultColumnConfig in vm.defaultColumnConfigs --><button class="tab defaultLoadTab" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedColumnConfig.id === defaultColumnConfig.id, 'is-first': $first}" data-ng-click="vm.setDefaultColumnConfig(defaultColumnConfig)" data-ng-repeat="defaultColumnConfig in vm.defaultColumnConfigs">Historik
				</button><!-- end ngRepeat: defaultColumnConfig in vm.defaultColumnConfigs -->
<!-- ngRepeat: columnConfig in vm.columnConfigs -->
<button class="tab loadTab" data-ng-class="{'is-selected': vm.selectedColumnConfig.id === vm.customColumnConfig.id}" data-ng-click="vm.setCustomColumnConfig()" name="load"><span class="ellipsis">Anpassad</span>
</button>
</div>
<button class="tabsScroller ng-hide" data-aza-scroller-left-control="" data-ng-hide="isAtStart">
<svg height="12.14" viewbox="0 0 7 12.14" width="7" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M.5 12.14a.5.5 0 0 1-.34-.87l5.61-5.2L.16.87A.5.5 0 0 1 .84.13l6 5.57a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .73L.84 12a.5.5 0 0 1-.34.14z" fill="#787878"></path>
</svg>
</button>
<button class="tabsScroller ng-hide" data-aza-scroller-right-control="" data-ng-hide="isAtEnd">
<svg height="12.14" viewbox="0 0 7 12.14" width="7" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M.5 12.14a.5.5 0 0 1-.34-.87l5.61-5.2L.16.87A.5.5 0 0 1 .84.13l6 5.57a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .73L.84 12a.5.5 0 0 1-.34.14z" fill="#787878"></path>
</svg>
</button>
<button class="tab editTab is-last" data-ng-class="{'is-active': vm.showCategoryLibrary}" data-ng-click="vm.toggleCategoryLibrary()" name="edit-list" title="Redigera kolumner">
<svg height="19" viewbox="0 0 19 19" width="19" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M9.5 13C7.566 13 6 11.434 6 9.5s1.566-3.502 3.5-3.502S13 7.566 13 9.5c0 1.933-1.566 3.5-3.5 3.5zm9.322-1.685c.114-.588.178-1.194.178-1.815 0-.614-.064-1.212-.174-1.794h-2.67c-.158-.583-.387-1.136-.683-1.648l1.89-1.89c-.682-1.003-1.55-1.87-2.556-2.548L12.92 3.505c-.51-.295-1.064-.524-1.647-.68V.17C10.698.064 10.106 0 9.5 0c-.63 0-1.242.064-1.836.18v2.644c-.584.157-1.136.386-1.65.68L4.158 1.648C3.154 2.33 2.29 3.2 1.612 4.208l1.85 1.85c-.294.512-.523 1.065-.68 1.65H.174C.064 8.285 0 8.885 0 9.5c0 .62.064 1.227.178 1.815h2.604c.157.584.386 1.137.68 1.65l-1.842 1.84c.68 1.007 1.546 1.875 2.55 2.557l1.846-1.847c.512.295 1.064.524 1.648.682v2.62c.594.12 1.206.183 1.836.183.606 0 1.198-.063 1.773-.17v-2.632c.583-.158 1.136-.387 1.648-.682l1.875 1.872c1.007-.676 1.876-1.542 2.56-2.544l-1.88-1.88c.296-.512.525-1.065.682-1.65h2.667z" fill="#0077B1" fill-rule="evenodd"></path>
</svg>
</button>
</div>
<div class="categoryWrapper ng-hide" data-aza-html-compile="vm.columnsTemplate" data-ng-show="vm.showCategoryLibrary"></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="orderbookListTable component" data-aza-controller="market:orderbookListTableController as vm" data-ng-controller="orderbookListTableController as vm">

<button data-ng-click="scrollToNextColumn()" data-ng-disabled="!hasScroll || isAtRightEdge" disabled="" name="next">→</button>
</th>

<div class="text lgOffsetRight-0 smOffsetLeft-0 lgOffsetBottom-6 smOffsetBottom-6 mdOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetRight-0 section lgOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetRight-0 smOffsetRight-0 lg-12 sm-12 lgOffsetTop-0 smOffsetTop-0 md-12 xs-12 xsOffsetBottom-0 mdOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetTop-0 mdOffsetBottom-6">
<div class="">
					OBS! Om du inte är inloggad på sajten så visas alla kurser med 15 minuters fördröjning. Vi har inte streamade kurser för Norge, USA och Kanada i listan. Kurser för USA &amp; Kanada visas med 15 minuters fördröjning. <a adhocenable="false" href="/min-profil/installningar/abonnemang.html">Beställ realtidskurser för USA &amp; Kanada här.</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="box lgOffsetRight-0 smOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetRight-0 section lgOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetRight-0 smOffsetRight-0 lg-12 sm-12 lgOffsetTop-0 smOffsetTop-0 md-12 mdOffsetBottom-3 xs-12 smOffsetBottom-3 mdOffsetLeft-0 lgOffsetBottom-3 xsOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetBottom-3">
<div class="boxContainer u-relative padding10px bkgAvanzaLightGray" style="background-color: #f3fafc;">
<div class="u-clearFix flexStart">
<div class="parsys flexbox"><div class="text lgOffsetRight-0 smOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetTop-0 xsOffsetLeft-0 mdOffsetRight-0 section lgOffsetLeft-0 xsOffsetRight-0 smOffsetRight-0 lg-12 sm-12 lgOffsetTop-0 smOffsetTop-0 md-12 mdOffsetBottom-0 smOffsetBottom-0 xs-12 xsOffsetBottom-0 mdOffsetLeft-0 lgOffsetBottom-0 xsOffsetTop-0">
<div class="">
					Investeringsrekommendationerna på denna sida är en sammanfattning eller ett utdrag från en investeringsrekommendation som du hittar hos Placera Media. Källan bedöms som tillförlitlig men leverantören ansvarar för innehållet. Investeringsrekommendationerna sprids löpande utan känd periodicitet och informationen kan ändras över tid. Det är viktigt att du fattar egna beslut och bildar dig en egen uppfattning om lämpligheten att placera i de finansiella instrument som nämns. Avanza och Placera Media ingår båda i Avanza-koncernen. Avanza står under Finansinspektionens tillsyn. <a adhocenable="false" href="/sakerhet-villkor/investeringsrekommendationer.html" target="_blank">Här hittar du mer information om investeringsrekommendationer</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</main>

<script>
			var require = {
					baseUrl: '/frontend/script.ver-3011363.js/production/',
					waitSeconds: 0
			};
		</script>
<script src="/frontend/script.ver-3011363.core.js"></script>
</body></html>

Comparing the visible content of the webpage, let us search for, for example, AstraZeneca, in the source. We will find that the names are contained in elements that look like this:

                                                <td class="orderbookName">
                                                        <a class="ellipsis" href="/aktier/om-aktien.html/5431/astrazeneca">
                                                                <span class="flag small SE"></span>AstraZeneca
                                                        </a>
                                                </td>

Unfortunately, the names and the numerical data have been detached into different tables, so we cannot process the table simply row-by-row, but we need to first collect the names and then the numerical data.

We will collect all td elements that have the class orderbookName. The name of the stock is as a textual content of the element. In this case, we can access it simply by the .text member. In a more complicated case, we might have to issue, e.g., cell.find_all(text=True).

The text contains a lot of whitespace around it, so it makes sense to strip that whitespace away.

In [7]:
names = list()
for cell in soup.find_all('td',class_='orderbookName'):
    names.append(cell.text.strip())
names

In [9]:
len(names)
Out[9]:
157

We can identify that in the snapshot that we have, AstraZeneca, for example, would have the following numbers: |Senast |+/-%|1 år %|Börsvärde MSEK|P/E-tal|Direktavk. %|Ägare |Lista |-------|----|------|--------------|-------|------------|------|----- |1423,00|0 |-3,98 |2 202 059 |34,05 |2,13 |62 653|Large Cap Stockholm

Here Senast is the latest quote of the share value, +/-% daily change in value, 1 år % percentual change over the year, Börsvärde MSEK market value of the company in millions of kronor, P/E-tal the P/E value of the company, Direktavkastning is the dividend yield, Ägare the numer of owners, and List which list the stock is listed under in Stockholm stock exchange.

We can find these in the following element (A substantial amount of whitespace has been removed):

                            <tr class="row rowId11" id="11">
                                    <td class="">
                                                <span class="pushBox" data-aza-push="vm.pushData.latest['5431'].lastPrice" data-aza-push-fractions="2">
1423,00 
                                                </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="neutral">
                                                <span data-ng-class="{'neutral': vm.commonService.isNeutral(vm.pushData.latest['5431'].changePercent), 'negative': vm.commonService.isNegative(vm.pushData.latest['5431'].changePercent), 'positive': vm.commonService.isPositive(vm.pushData.latest['5431'].changePercent)}" data-aza-push="vm.pushData.latest['5431'].changePercent" data-aza-push-fractions="2" class="neutral" style="">
0 
                                                </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="negative">
                                                <span>
-3,98 </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="">
                                                <span>
2&nbsp;202&nbsp;059 </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="">
                                                <span>
34,05 </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="">
                                                <span>
2,13 </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td class="">
                                                <span>
62&nbsp;653 </span>
                                    </td>

                                    <td class="">
                                                <span>
Large Cap Stockholm </span>
                                    </td>
                            </tr>

So we will need to find tr elements that have class row.

In [12]:
soup.find('tr',class_='row')
Out[12]:
<tr class="row rowId0" id="0">
<td class="buySellButtons">
<ul class="u-cleanList u-floatList buySellButtons">
<li>
<a class="button buyBtn smallBtn" href="/handla/order.html/kop/26268" title="Köp">Köp</a>
</li>
</ul>
</td>
<td class="orderbookName">
<a class="ellipsis" href="/aktier/om-aktien.html/26268/aak">
<span class="flag small SE"></span>AAK
							</a>
</td>
</tr>

Unfortunately, this will also find the name rows we found above. So let us try to find the particular element with the value we know it has, and then try to find its parent table element (all tr elements belong to a table). Since the text contains unnecessary characters, we can match it with regex.

In [15]:
import re
element = soup.find(string=re.compile(r'.*1423,00.*'))

Now we can navigate to its parent.

In [18]:
table = element.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent
table.name
Out[18]:
'table'

Yay, so this is the table that we are looking for. So now let's look for the children underneath.

In [21]:
table.find('tr',class_='row')
Out[21]:
<tr class="row rowId0" id="0">
<td class="">
<span class="pushBox" data-aza-push="vm.pushData.latest['26268'].lastPrice" data-aza-push-fractions="2">
                                                    











	


	

229,60 
                                                </span>
</td>
<td class="positive">
<span class="positive" data-aza-push="vm.pushData.latest['26268'].changePercent" data-aza-push-fractions="2" data-ng-class="{'neutral': vm.commonService.isNeutral(vm.pushData.latest['26268'].changePercent), 'negative': vm.commonService.isNegative(vm.pushData.latest['26268'].changePercent), 'positive': vm.commonService.isPositive(vm.pushData.latest['26268'].changePercent)}" style="">
                                                    











	


	

1,32 
                                                </span>
</td>
<td class="positive">
<span>











	


	

24,04 </span>
</td>
<td class="">
<span>











	


	

58 817 </span>
</td>
<td class="">
<span>











	


	

22,61 </span>
</td>
<td class="">
<span>











	


	

1,21 </span>
</td>
<td class="">
<span>











	


	

9 526 </span>
</td>
<td class="">
<span>











	


	

Large Cap Stockholm </span>
</td>
</tr>

This is the data we want. So let's start extracting td element by element.

In [24]:
for cell in table.find('tr',class_='row').select('td'):
    print(cell.text.strip())

229,60
1,32
24,04
58 817
22,61
1,21
9 526
Large Cap Stockholm

We will need to do this for all such rows, so we will use find_all and then construct the values.

In [27]:
values = list()
for row in table.find_all('tr',class_='row'):
    values.append([cell.text.strip() for cell in row.select('td')])
values

In [29]:
len(values)
Out[29]:
157

An important thing to notice here is that some values contain weird-looking \xa0 characters. What are those? In HTML, for example, the string '58\xa0817' above looks like 58&nbsp;817. The entity &nbsp; is a non-breaking space, it is a character that looks like a space but is not space. It is used, for example, to separate digit groups or tie units to numbers; it differs from space in that the web browser refuses to split the string into two different lines at the nbsp. These will cause trouble, as well as the use of comma as digit separator, so let's handle those next.

In [32]:
values = [list(map(lambda s: s.replace('\xa0','').replace(',','.'),row)) for row in values]
values = [list(map(float,row[:3])) + [int(row[3])] + \
          list(map(float,row[4:6])) + [int(row[6])] + [row[7]] for row in values]
values
Out[32]:

Now we can construct a dataframe.

In [35]:
import pandas as pd
data = list()
for (name,val) in zip(names,values):
    row = { 'Name' : name,
            'Latest' : val[0],
            'Change %' : val[1],
            '1 year %' : val[2],
            'Market value MSEK' : val[3],
            'P/E' : val[4],
            'Dividend yield %' : val[5],
            'Owners' : val[6],
            'List' : val[7]
          }
    data.append(row)
data = pd.DataFrame(data)
data
Out[35]:

This can then be exported into a CSV file.

In [38]:
data.to_csv('avanza.csv',index=None)
